ns0:entry.ns0:title: HandsOnLLM/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HandsOnLLM/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
Language: jupyter-notebook
Official code repo for the O'Reilly Book - "Hands-On Large Language Models"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lordog/dive-into-llms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lordog/dive-into-llms
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Marktechpost/AI-Agents-Projects-Tutorials
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Marktechpost/AI-Agents-Projects-Tutorials
Language: jupyter-notebook
Multi-agent systems, memory, planning, reasoning loops

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBMB/MiniCPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBMB/MiniCPM
Language: jupyter-notebook
MiniCPM5-1B: A SOTA 1B on-device LLM, small yet powerful.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Course Files for Complete Python 3 Bootcamp Course on Udemy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: advimman/lama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/advimman/lama
Language: jupyter-notebook
🦙 LaMa Image Inpainting, Resolution-robust Large Mask Inpainting with Fourier Convolutions, WACV 2022

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-ml3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-ml3
Language: jupyter-notebook
A series of Jupyter notebooks that walk you through the fundamentals of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Python using Scikit-Learn, Keras and TensorFlow 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chiphuyen/aie-book
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chiphuyen/aie-book
Language: jupyter-notebook
[WIP] Resources for AI engineers. Also contains supporting materials for the book AI Engineering (Chip Huyen, 2025)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/audiocraft
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft
Language: jupyter-notebook
Audiocraft is a library for audio processing and generation with deep learning. It features the state-of-the-art EnCodec audio compressor / tokenizer, along with MusicGen, a simple and controllable music generation LM with textual and melodic conditioning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: greyhatguy007/Machine-Learning-Specialization-Coursera
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/greyhatguy007/Machine-Learning-Specialization-Coursera
Language: jupyter-notebook
Contains Solutions and Notes for the Machine Learning Specialization By Stanford University and Deeplearning.ai - Coursera (2022) by Prof. Andrew NG

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hustvl/4DGaussians
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hustvl/4DGaussians
Language: jupyter-notebook
[CVPR 2024] 4D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Dynamic Scene Rendering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/openai-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
Technical resources for AI developers to build applications, agents, and systems using Oracle AI Database and OCI services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
In-depth tutorials on LLMs, RAGs and real-world AI agent applications.
